prompts: /parallel_subagents is running… 'in leadcarrot project, Fix the navigation and separation of concerns for the app. 1- If a user has a system role then show a button in the app header to goto the system dashboard. 2- If a user has an agency role then show a button in the app header to goto the agency dashboard. 3- Only show the Agency nav menu in the nav app sidebar when we are on the agency route. 4- Only show the System nav menu in the nav app sidebar when we are on the system route' 5

when using the parallel_subagents command to make code changes we should always be working in a new git branch, and after our validator has completed successfully we should commit that branch and do a pr to merge into main.
